name: Chocolate Butter Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the butter with an electric mixer on medium speed until fluffy.
2. Gradually add the sifted powdered sugar and cocoa powder, beating constantly.
3. Add the milk and vanilla, then continue beating to incorporate.
4. Beat in additional milk and more sifted powdered sugar as needed, until the frosting is smooth and spreadable.
